title: Microsoft lays off 5,000 employees in Xbox and restructures its game studios
summary: The company announces the exit of four studios and a reset of the Xbox division, including closures and mass layoffs.

title: Sony abandons physical format for PlayStation and the largest German video game archive collapses
summary: Sony's disc factory will be converted to optical microlenses, while the preservation project of 60,000 games runs out of funding.

title: Nintendo launches a Switch 2 revision in Europe with lower battery life and heavier weight
summary: The new version will arrive this summer, while sales of the original console will stop in February 2027.

title: The Milky Way is 10% larger than previously known, NASA rescues its Swift telescope, and SpaceX burns 260 Starlink satellites
summary: Astronomy and space exploration experience progress and environmental controversies due to satellite reentries.

title: China bans humanoid chatbots, Bender clarifies the term stochastic parrot, and Reddit uses AI to solve problems created by AI
summary: The ethical and regulatory debate on artificial intelligence intensifies with control measures and new reflections.

title: Steam strengthens its position in handheld gaming: new interviews about Steam Machine, SteamOS for handhelds, and the costly Ayaneo
summary: The Steam ecosystem expands into handheld devices with improvements in SteamOS, ultra-expensive consoles, and historical analyses.

title: China advances its AI chips: Huawei enters South Korea, Biren seeks 892 million dollars, and Baidu launches unlimited OCR
summary: The Chinese semiconductor industry for artificial intelligence accelerates its global expansion with products and funding.

title: Canadian agency hacks criminals, DOJ closes case against Abbott, and Wisconsin sues Microsoft over data center noise
summary: The judicial news includes cyberespionage operations, case closings, and lawsuits for noise pollution.

title: Organic Maps adds satellite images, networks spread maps of the end of the heatwave, and an interactive map of British railway
summary: Map applications offer new functionalities and go viral amid the heatwave.

title: Amazon closes its Mechanical Turk platform, the origin of artificial artificial intelligence
summary: The micro-task service, key in training AI models, stops accepting new clients and heads toward its demise.

title: AMD presents Ryzen AI Halo, a powerful AI development kit for $4,000
summary: Reviews describe the system as the equivalent of Nvidia's DGX Spark, competing in performance for artificial intelligence.

title: Nvidia Kyber racks for the Rubin architecture are delayed until 2028 due to board problems
summary: Asian suppliers confirm the delay of more than a year due to failures in the intermediate circuit design.

title: The GeForce RTX 3060 12GB returns to Newegg at $329.99
summary: The mid-range graphics card becomes available again after a period of stock shortages.

title: Fable 5 and Claude Code port the game Command & Conquer to iOS in just hours
summary: An artificial intelligence experiment demonstrates its ability to adapt classic software to modern platforms almost instantly.

title: New tools allow scanning AI agents for dangerous capabilities, but also evading them
summary: Researchers present both an agent scanner and an obfuscation technique that bypasses these detectors.

title: JADEPUFFER, the first ransomware with autonomous agent, and a critical vulnerability in Opera GX
summary: Cyber threats evolve with malware that acts as an agent and security flaws in the browser that allow installing malicious mods.

title: MSI validates DDR5-8000+ memory on AMD boards and a creator builds their own homemade magnetic memory
summary: The memory world shows advances from speed records to artisanal solutions with Apollo-era technology.

title: Electric drone breaks speed record with 434 mph and Tesla launches its robotaxi service in Miami
summary: Electric transportation advances with an interceptor drone and the debut of Tesla's autonomous taxi in a US city.

title: Linux kernel fixes a USB bandwidth issue and the CalyxOS system updates to version 7.2.2
summary: Open source software updates improve performance and add support for new devices.

title: Acer launches Swift 16 AI laptop with OLED and a gaming PC with RTX 5090 is offered at a discount of $1,050
summary: New in the hardware market: an AI laptop and a bargain on a high-end computer.
